title: The Last Emperor
notes: I wish it wasn't shot in English as it took away from the immersion, but good overall. A classic three act structure.

title: Kids
notes: Uncomfortable, but it seems like it set out to do that by 'documenting' kids growing up on the streets in the 90's

title: Jurassic Park
notes: One of my top three movies of all time. What can I say I was 5 when it came out.

title: A River Runs Through It
notes: One of my top three movies of all time. I saw it as a teenager in the prime of my fly fishing years.

title: Grave of the Fireflies
notes: One of my top three movies of all time. I remember on one of trips to Japan watching it with Tram and both of use just crying in the hotel room.
